mapper.select: SELECT h.id, h.deleted, h.created_at AS createdAt, h.modified_at AS modifiedAt, h.title, h.role, h.text, h.user_space_id AS userSpaceId, h.folder_id AS folderId, us.space_id AS spaceId, s.work_name AS workName, g.id AS groupId, g.group_name AS groupName, u.name AS userName FROM handover h LEFT JOIN user_space us ON h.user_space_id = us.id LEFT JOIN space s ON us.space_id = s.id LEFT JOIN tb_group g ON s.group_id = g.id LEFT JOIN user u ON us.user_id = u.id WHERE h.id = #{id}

SELECT h.id, h.title, h.role, h.user_space_id AS userSpaceId, h.folder_id AS folderId, h.created_at AS createdAt, u.name AS userName FROM handover h INNER JOIN user_space us ON h.user_space_id = us.id LEFT JOIN user u ON us.user_id = u.id WHERE us.space_id = #{spaceId} AND h.deleted = false AND h.folder_id IS NULL ORDER BY h.created_at DESC

SELECT h.id, h.title, h.role, h.user_space_id AS userSpaceId, h.folder_id AS folderId, h.created_at AS createdAt, u.name AS userName FROM handover h INNER JOIN user_space us ON h.user_space_id = us.id LEFT JOIN user u ON us.user_id = u.id WHERE us.space_id = #{param1} AND h.deleted = false AND h.folder_id = #{param2} ORDER BY h.created_at DESC

SELECT h.id, h.deleted, h.created_at AS createdAt, h.modified_at AS modifiedAt, h.title, h.role, h.text, h.user_space_id AS userSpaceId, h.folder_id AS folderId, us.space_id AS spaceId, s.work_name AS workName, g.id AS groupId, g.group_name AS groupName, u.name AS userName FROM handover h LEFT JOIN user_space us ON h.user_space_id = us.id LEFT JOIN space s ON us.space_id = s.id LEFT JOIN tb_group g ON s.group_id = g.id LEFT JOIN user u ON us.user_id = u.id WHERE h.user_space_id = #{userSpaceId} AND h.deleted = false ORDER BY h.created_at DESC LIMIT 1
